items.title: U.A.E. Expels Pakistani Workers, as Pakistan’s Peacemaking Creates a Rift
items.summary: As Pakistan mediates between the U.S. and Iran, its ties to the Emirates have deteriorated. Pakistani workers say they are now being sent home en masse.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: West Bengal government formation LIVE: Suvendu Adhikari elected new CM of Bengal, to take oath on May 9
items.summary: Union Home Minister Amit Shah, who presided over BJP legislature party meeting said that all the proposals were received in favour of Suvendu Adhikari.

items.title: Return of Palestine Marathon attracts thousands of runners
items.summary: Thousands of people have taken part in the Palestine Marathon and Half Marathon which returned to the West Bank city of Bethlehem after a two-year pause because of restrictions...
